appmesh.virtualnode.clientpolicytls.Cert.Docs: A reference to an object that represents a client's TLS certificate.

appmesh.virtualnode.clientpolicytls.Enfo.Docs: Whether the policy is enforced. The default is `True`, if a value isn't specified.

appmesh.virtualnode.clientpolicytls.Port.Docs: One or more ports that the policy is enforced for.

appmesh.virtualnode.clientpolicytls.Vali.Docs: A reference to an object that represents a TLS validation context.
